Best-in-class US comps/unit growth; premium to MCD 19.3x, vs Wingstop ~25x (everyticker QSR comps Jun-2026)
Company-op burger, low margin; Shake Shack/company-op QSR ~9-11x
Mid of $3.6-4.3B LongRange deal, ~11.4% leakage for low-basis tax (Bloomberg May 29 2026)

ZIM.valuation_basis: Merger-arb, all-cash. Hapag-Lloyd to acquire ZIM at $35.00 cash/sh (agreement dated 2/16/26; aggregate ~$4.2B; investors.zim.com). Shareholder vote ALREADY PASSED 4/30/26. Public holders receive the FULL $35.00 cash -> the 'New ZIM' FIMI carve-out (16 vessels + Israeli Special State Share) is a SEPARATE vehicle and does NOT dilute consideration (confirmed via deal FAQ/PR). Close expected Q4/late-2026; outside date 2/17/27 (extendable to 6/30/27 for regulatory). Ref $25.60 -> ~36.7% gross spread despite a passed vote = market pricing heavy completion risk (carrier antitrust + Israeli regulatory + ~6-13mo tail). Market-implied: with win=$35, break~$18 (standalone cyclical liner), price $25.60 implies ~44.5% win / ~55% break.
ZIM.prob_basis: Signed + shareholder-approved (4/30/26) argues for a low base break rate, but the 36.7% spread embeds ~55% market-implied break (antitrust between carriers + Israeli state mechanics + long tail). I split the difference at 50%. Floor = undisturbed standalone ~$18 (mid-cycle container liner, highly cyclical; pre-deal trade ~$18-22). Source: deal FAQ/PR investors.zim.com; outside date 2/17/27.

SSSS.valuation_basis: Externalization to Neostellar Advisors (Magnetar JV) approved by board Apr 2 2026, +$20M Magnetar investment, fee cut 4.98%->4.21%; stockholder vote Jun 10 2026, July-1 Neostellar rebrand. NAV $14.24/sh at 3/31/2026 (up 76% QoQ from $8.09 on unrealized AI/venture marks); 26.07M sh. KEY: SSSS trades at $13.86 ~ only 2.7% discount to NAV (rich for a venture BDC), and going EXTERNALLY-managed structurally WIDENS the NAV discount (fee leakage to manager + 20% incentive fee over 7% hurdle) rather than narrowing it. My fair value applies a 12% external-manager/venture-illiquidity discount: $14.24*0.88 = $12.5. Build: portfolio NAV $14.24*26.07M = $371M (net), less external-mgr-discount adj $45M, /26.07 = $12.5. HONEST NO_UPSIDE: market over-priced the 76% mark surge + deal; pre-IPO marks unrealized/aggressive.

sop_components.basis: SSSS Q1-2026 net assets $361.6M restated to $14.24/sh NAV * 26.07M sh (Q1 8-K); guided 'up to $14.50'

ANNX.valuation_basis: Barbell on two H2-2026 catalysts. ANCHOR LEG (de-risked): tanruprubart (ANX005) for Guillain-Barre — Phase 3 FORWARD already POSITIVE (beat IVIG on disability), EMA MAA filed 2026-01-08, US BLA planned 2026 (globenewswire 2026-01-12). US GBS ~3,000-6,000 new cases/yr (CDC via GrandView/Mordor 2026); first-in-class complement inhibitor = pricing/share upside. SHOT LEG (true binary): ARCHER II Phase 3 in dry-AMD geographic atrophy (vonaprument/ANX007), enrollment complete 659 pts (ir.annexonbio), topline H2-2026 — complement in GA has a checkered class history so this is ~coin-flip. win_prob 0.45 reflects GBS approvable + GA supportive; on a win the equity re-rates toward sell-side consensus $11.50 (range $7-$16, FMP). On loss (GA miss / GBS-only), stock guts toward cash. Cash $238.3M (12/31/25), runway H2-2027; ~119.6M sh => ~$1.99/sh cash, floor $2.00. reference_rr is binary EV% = 0.45*(11.5-5.145)/5.145 + 0.55*(2.0-5.145)/5.145 = +0.22.
ANNX.prob_basis: GBS leg de-risked by POSITIVE Phase 3 FORWARD (tanruprubart > IVIG on disability, AAN Apr-2025) + EMA MAA filed Jan-2026; GA/ARCHER-II leg discounted to ~coin-flip given mixed complement-in-GA class history. Blended 0.45.

AQST.valuation_basis: RE-APPROVAL binary, not a primary-efficacy coin-flip. Anaphylm (sublingual epinephrine film) received a NARROW CRL on 2026-01-30 limited to Human Factors (pouch-opening/film-placement) + a supportive PK study + labeling — company states explicitly NO CMC issues and auto-injector comparability NOT questioned (8-K 2026-01-30). Type A meeting completed; FDA gave clarifying HF/PK feedback; resubmission guided Q3-2026 with rapid-review request (investors.aquestive). Because the deficiencies are fixable/procedural, win_prob 0.70. On approval the equity re-rates toward sell-side consensus $9 (range $6-$12, FMP); sublingual epi displaces autoinjectors in a multi-$B allergy market, plus Libervant/Sympazan revenue underpins. On a second CRL the single-catalyst thesis breaks and the stock reverts to pre-CRL distress. Cash $110.7M, net debt $22.8M (Q1-26), ~99.3M sh — NOT pure cash, so floor set at pre-CRL/52wk-low stress ~$2.75 (52wk low $2.93). target_on_win $8.50. EV% = 0.70*(8.5-3.895)/3.895 + 0.30*(2.75-3.895)/3.895 = +0.74.
AQST.prob_basis: CRL is procedural/narrow (HF + supportive PK + labeling; NO CMC, comparability intact) per 2026-01-30 8-K; Type A feedback received, resubmit Q3-2026. Re-approval of an otherwise-complete file => 0.70.

AVBP.valuation_basis: Pivotal Phase 3 FURVENT (firmonertinib monotherapy, 1L EGFR exon20-insertion NSCLC; NCT05607550), PFS by BICR primary, enrollment complete, topline guided MID-2026 (Q1-26 results 2026-05-11; original 'early-2026' guide slipped to mid). MoA substantially de-risked: firmonertinib is APPROVED in China (as furmonertinib) with a large monotherapy dataset; 1L exon20 is a genuine unmet need vs amivantamab+chemo SoC. win_prob 0.60. On a positive PFS readout the equity re-rates toward the tight sell-side consensus $45 (high $45, low $45 — unusually high-conviction; avg PT $42, FMP). On a miss, a broad pipeline (PACC NSCLC path, ADCs) + $326.4M cash (Q1-26, ~$7/sh) floors the stock well above cash — 52wk low $16.10 — so downside_on_loss $15. EV% = 0.60*(45-30.51)/30.51 + 0.40*(15-30.51)/30.51 = +0.08 (thin: most of the consensus PT is already in the $30.51 price).
AVBP.prob_basis: MoA de-risked — firmonertinib already approved in China with monotherapy data; 1L exon20 PFS-vs-SoC bar still real. 0.60.

EYPT.valuation_basis: Two pivotal Phase 3 trials of DURAVYU (vorolanib intravitreal insert, q6-month) vs aflibercept in wet-AMD: LUGANO + LUCIA, >900 pts randomized, patient-centric NON-INFERIORITY BCVA design; 3rd consecutive POSITIVE DSMC 'continue as planned' (globenewswire 2026-05-14); LUGANO topline MID-2026, LUCIA shortly after. NI design + de-risked Phase 2 (DAVIO) raise odds; win_prob 0.60. On NI success the equity re-rates toward sell-side consensus $37.5 (range $36-$39, very high conviction, FMP) — a durable 6-month anti-VEGF would be a major share-taker. On an NI miss the single-asset story craters toward cash $222.5M (Q1-26, ~$2.66/sh) but residual platform value + 52wk-low $7.94 set floor $5.50. EV% = 0.60*(37.5-11.475)/11.475 + 0.40*(5.5-11.475)/11.475 = +1.15 (large, because the market assigns low odds and the stock sits near 52wk lows).
EYPT.prob_basis: NI (not superiority) endpoint + de-risked DAVIO Phase 2 + 3 clean DSMC reads; offset by single-pivotal-asset binary risk. 0.60.

GSAT.valuation_basis: Defined-price merger-arb. Amazon definitive agreement signed 2026-04-13/14 to acquire Globalstar: each share elects $90.00 CASH or 0.3210 AMZN capped at $90 (40% aggregate cash-election cap w/ proration); deal_price = $90 cash consideration. Majority holder Thermo (~57.6%) already APPROVED by written consent (13D/A) => no shareholder-vote risk. Main gate is regulatory (FCC license transfer / CFIUS / HSR) over a LONG runway — company guides close in 2027 (8-K 2026-03-31 / Q1 10-Q). Downward adjustment up to $110M if operational milestones missed = $110M/128.6M sh ~ $0.86/sh, immaterial to thesis. break_prob 0.12 (strategically clean: Amazon Leo direct-to-device + spectrum; risk is timeline/regulatory not antitrust-substantive). undisturbed_price $41.50 = late-Oct-2025 pre-Bloomberg-sale-rumor level implied by the cited ~117% premium (stock had already run to the $70s on sale speculation before signing). reference_rr = (90-81.04)/(81.04-41.50) = 0.227 — a wide, long-dated (2027) spread, which is the trade.

IDYA.valuation_basis: Event = FDA approval of darovasertib+crizotinib in 1L HLA-A*02:01-neg metastatic uveal melanoma under OCE RTOR (NDA submission H2-2026; FDA agreed Apr-30-2026). NOTE: this is a HIGH-PROBABILITY approval, not a coin-flip efficacy bet — the pivotal OptimUM-02 already HIT (mPFS 6.9 vs 3.1 mo, HR 0.42, p<0.0001 by BICR; complete data ASCO Jun-1-2026, PRNewswire/ir.ideayabio.com). So the binary is regulatory conversion, not data. CALIBRATED win_prob 0.85 (Guggenheim moved POS to 95% post-data; I haircut for CRL/label/timing risk). target_on_win $52 = post-approval Street clustering ($50 UBS, $52 Mizuho, $53 RBC, $54 Guggenheim, $65 Truist; US daro mUM peak ~$800M Truist + ex-US Servier double-digit royalties + up-to-$320M milestones + synthetic-lethality pipeline option). downside_on_loss $15 = net cash ~$7.3/sh ($671M cash+ST inv + ~$300M LT inv, 87.86M sh) + IDE397/IDE161/IDE849 pipeline residual ~$8/sh. Barbell, not ratio. EV = 0.85*52 + 0.15*15 = $46.45 vs ref $30.825 -> +50.7% expected value.
IDYA.prob_basis: Pivotal OptimUM-02 already positive (HR 0.42, p<0.0001) under RTOR -> approval-conditional, not efficacy-conditional; Guggenheim POS 95%, haircut to 0.85 for CRL/label/timing. Sources: PRNewswire NDA/RTOR release; ir.ideayabio.com Apr-13-2026 topline; Investing.com Guggenheim/RBC/Mizuho/Truist notes.

KBR.valuation_basis: Tax-free spin of Mission Technology Solutions (announced Sep 24 2025, completion mid/late-2026; SpinCo distribution by Jan 4 2027) + Engine Capital (~2% stake) urging full sale at $48-55. FY2025 segment Adj EBITDA: MTS (gov/defense/space) $579M on $5,581M rev; STS (sustainable/process-tech IP) $497M on $2,205M rev; total Adj EBITDA $968M (KBR Q4/FY25 release Feb 26 2026). Net debt $2,490M (Q1-FY26 BS 2026-04-03); 129M dil sh. Gov-services sector DE-RATED hard (KBR $54->$30 on DOGE/budget cuts; MTS rev -14% Q4 on EUCOM/procurement). Build: MTS $579M*9.5x (depressed LDOS/SAIC/BAH band 9-12x) + STS $497M*11x (specialty process-tech), less corp drag adj ($1,026M = -$108M EBITDA at 9.5x) less pension/legacy-legal adj $600M less net debt, /129 = $53.1. Lands within Engine's $48-55 band; ~50% upside.

sop_components.basis: Gov-IT services de-rated 2025-26; LDOS/SAIC/BAH/ACM ~9-12x, MTS at low end on -14% rev decline (KBR FY25 release)
Energy-transition/IP-licensing higher quality (22.5% EBITDA margin); specialty/process comps 11-14x

SION.valuation_basis: Dual hard binary, both topline SUMMER 2026 (Q1-2026 release May-12-2026 + Apr-27-2026 enrollment-complete PR, investors.sionnatx.com): SION-719 PreciSION CF Ph2a (first-in-class NBD1 stabilizer ADDED to Trikafta SOC) and SION-451 Ph1 dual-combo. GENUINE high-risk POC — novel NBD1 mechanism must show incremental benefit on top of best-in-class Vertex SOC in a Vertex-dominated CF market; NO clean comp for an unproven add-on, so I WIDEN the floor. CALIBRATED win_prob 0.35. ~$289.9M cash ($216.2M cash+ST + $75.3M LT inv), funds into 2028, ~45.1M sh -> ~$6.4/sh cash. target_on_win $60 = NBD1 validation + Vertex-competitive CF franchise re-rate (CF assets command large multiples vs Vertex's ~$10B franchise; SION 52wk high $48.45). downside_on_loss $10 = modest premium to $6.4 cash + residual pipeline optionality. Barbell. EV = 0.35*60 + 0.65*10 = $27.5 vs ref $33.345 -> NEGATIVE expected value at this price (stock rich into a low-POS coin-flip).
SION.prob_basis: First-in-class NBD1 stabilizer Ph2a add-on to Trikafta — high mechanistic uncertainty + high bar of incremental benefit over best-in-class SOC in Vertex-dominated CF; POC-stage single readout. Calibrated 0.35. Sources: investors.sionnatx.com Q1-2026 release (May-12-2026), Apr-27-2026 enrollment-complete PR, stocktitan.

TYRA.valuation_basis: Proximate hard binary = SURF302 (TYRA-300/dabogratinib, oral FGFR3 inhibitor, FGFR3-altered low-grade intermediate-risk NMIBC) initial 3-month complete-response data from both dose cohorts AUG-2026 (>20 pts enrolled; Q1-2026 release via PRNewswire/SEC 8-K); followed by BEACH301 achondroplasia 6-mo height-velocity safety-sentinel data Q4-2026 (4 dose levels cleared, no notable safety events). FGFR3 is a validated NMIBC driver + differentiated ACH mechanism vs BridgeBio/BioMarin. CALIBRATED win_prob 0.55 (good target validation + oral convenience, but single-arm Ph2 CR bar). ~$388M cash ($383.5M cash+ST), ~59.5M sh -> ~$6.5/sh cash. target_on_win $45 = post-NMIBC-derisk toward Street (consensus $49.44; Canaccord $50, Guggenheim $54, Piper $56). downside_on_loss $14 = $6.5 cash + still-pending BEACH301 achondroplasia option + FGFR platform residual. Barbell. EV = 0.55*45 + 0.45*14 = $31.05 vs ref $26.52 -> +17% positive EV.
TYRA.prob_basis: FGFR3 validated in NMIBC; oral TYRA-300 with clean tolerability; but single-arm Ph2 3-mo CR endpoint carries real risk. Calibrated 0.55. Optionality preserved on loss via pending BEACH301 ACH readout. Sources: PRNewswire Q1-2026 release, SEC 10-Q/8-K (Mar-31-2026), Investing.com analyst notes (Oppenheimer $36->raised, Piper $56, Guggenheim $54).

VACI.valuation_basis: De-SPAC, NOT a premium cash-merger arb. Definitive BCA Apr-16-2026 (announced Apr-17): Viking Acquisition Corp I merges with NorthStar Earth & Space (SSA/SDA, 4 operational satellites, 74 employees, pre-revenue), rebrands NSTR on NYSE, $300M pre-money, $30M fully-committed PIPE anchored by Cartesian Capital, expected close Q3-2026, outside date Jan-31-2027 (globenewswire/SEC Form 425). Common receives $10 NAV (no premium consideration) + warrants; ~30M closing shares. The arb instrument here is the TRUST REDEMPTION RIGHT, so fair value is bounded by trust (~$10.40/sh incl. accrued interest by Q3 close), NOT a takeout premium. deal_price $10.40 = trust/redemption value at expected close; undisturbed_price $10.00 = NAV (SPAC never traded a real pre-bid level below trust). break_prob 0.35 (small $30M PIPE + pre-revenue target -> heavy-redemption / no-deal risk). This is a capital-preservation cash-box near trust, NOT a juiced spread — reference_rr is thin (ref $10.25 already at/above trust).

ABUS.valuation_basis: Catalyst = $950M non-contingent Moderna settlement payment due on/before Jul 8 2026 (announced Mar 3 2026, 8-K). Arbutus's confirmed share = $178.7M (=$0.91/sh on 196.9M sh) via its 20% Genevant license royalty + ~16% Genevant equity stake, incl. litigation-cost reimbursement (Q1 2026 10-Q / May 13 2026 release). Co. is EVALUATING a capital return in Q3 2026 (not yet a fixed declared $/sh). Pre-settlement cash $95.2M (=$0.48/sh). Contingent leg = $1.3B aggregate ONLY if Fed Circuit rules §1498 does not bar the claims; Arbutus effective ~18.8% => ~$245M gross, risk-weighted ~40% appeal-win => ~$98M (=$0.50/sh). FINDING: post-catalyst fair value (~$2.30) sits BELOW the live $4.215 — even crediting the full undiscounted contingent only gets ~$2.64. Mkt is pricing the HBV pipeline (imdusiran/AB-101) and/or a larger settlement share than filings support. R:R is NEGATIVE at this price (overpriced vs hard-cash fundamentals).
ABUS.prob_basis: Non-contingent $178.7M is near-certain (signed settlement, fixed Jul 8 2026 date). Contingent $1.3B risk-weighted ~40% on a genuinely contested Fed Circuit §1498 question (district court already characterized some doses as US-government use).

AES.valuation_basis: Signed all-cash take-private: GIP (BlackRock) + EQT Infrastructure VI consortium, $15.00/sh cash, merger agreement Mar 1 2026, DEFM14A filed, shareholder vote Jun 26 2026, expected close late-2026/early-2027. Equity ~$10.7-10.8B, TEV ~$33.4B; CalPERS + QIA co-underwriters w/ committed financing. fair_value_target=$15.00 deal price. undisturbed_price ~$13.00: genuine pre-leak level (stock ran on the Feb 3 takeover leak to $15.92 and on the Feb 24 Google data-center deal; a break gives back the take-private premium but AES retains the data-center re-rating; 52wk low $10.02). Gross spread only ~2.0% at $14.71 with a long, regulatory-heavy path (multi-state PUC + FERC + CFIUS given QIA). Tight late-stage arb: thin edge, asymmetric break downside.
AES.prob_basis: Break ~13%: signed/board-approved/DEFM14A filed with committed financing lowers deal risk, but long timeline to late-26/early-27 close and heavy regulatory load (state utility commissions, FERC, CFIUS via Qatar Investment Authority) keep meaningful regulatory break risk.

ATII.valuation_basis: SPAC: definitive business-combination agreement with Forge Nano (ALD semiconductor-equipment / defense-battery) dated Apr 20 2026; $1.2B Forge Nano valuation, ~$1.6B pro-forma; $100M PIPE at $10.00 + 15M warrants @ $10.00; S-4 filed May 7 2026 (not yet effective); expected close Q3 2026; combined co trades as NANO/NANOW. SPAC framing: downside_floor = trust redemption value ~$10.55/sh (=$10.00 IPO + ~1.5yr T-bill accretion; redemption right is a hard cash floor). fair_value_target ~$11.50 = pro-forma ~$10 NAV-equivalent (=$1.6B/~160M sh) + modest AI/defense-battery story premium. At $11.07 the stock already sits ~$0.50 over trust, so most of the narrative premium is in; downside is well-protected (only ~$0.52 below) but forward edge is limited.
ATII.prob_basis: De-SPAC completion likelihood is high (filed S-4 + committed $100M PIPE), but ~20% risk-weight captures termination/redemption-driven restructuring and the speculative, pre-scale nature of the Forge Nano de-SPAC value; trust floor caps loss regardless.

AXTA.valuation_basis: All-stock merger of equals with AkzoNobel (AKZA.AS): signed Nov 18 2025 (amended May 27 2026), fixed exchange ratio 0.6539 AkzoNobel ordinary shares per AXTA share; AXTA holders 45% / AKZA 55%; F-4 filed; both EGM votes back-half July 2026; close late-2026/early-2027; ~$600M synergies; competing bidders (Nippon Paint, Sherwin-Williams) withdrew by Jun 3 2026, both boards unanimously recommend. STOCK DEAL => deal_price floats with acquirer: 0.6539 x EUR56.50 (AKZA.AS live) x 1.15406 EUR/USD = $42.64/sh. (At announce it implied $47.08 / +67% off $28.18; AKZA has since fallen ~16% from its EUR67.6 high, compressing the headline value.) undisturbed_price=$28.18 (pre-Nov-18-2025). Gross ~33% at $32.01 is wide because: long timeline, EU/US/global antitrust overlap in coatings, AND holders bear unhedged AKZA equity risk — the real arb requires shorting 0.6539 AKZA/AXTA. reference_rr=2.78 on the naive (target-ref)/(ref-floor) basis OVERSTATES it for an unhedged holder.
AXTA.prob_basis: Break ~16%: signed MOE, F-4 filed, both boards recommend, rival bidders gone (Jun 3 2026) — but antitrust review of two large industrial/refinish coatings players across EU/US/others is the live gating risk over a long close window; reference_rr assumes the AKZA leg is hedged.

B.valuation_basis: IPO carve-out of North American Barrick (Nevada Gold Mines 61.5% + Pueblo Viejo + Fourmile), NY primary/Toronto secondary, targeted by end-2026, reaffirmed on-track in Apr-28-2026 SEC 6-K. Re-rates Tier-1 US/Caribbean assets to gold pure-play multiples vs current whole-co 4.92x EV/EBITDA (deep Mali/jurisdiction conglomerate discount). TTM EBITDA $12.95B; NET CASH ~$2.4B (EV $63.72B < mktcap $66.13B; netDebt/EBITDA -0.19x); ~1,675M sh. Build (attributable EBITDA, already net of NGM minority): NewCo NA $6,400M*7.5x = $48.0B (public range $42-60B; analysts $56-62B; provisional $42B - I anchor conservative 7.5x vs AEM/FNV 9-11x) + RemainCo gold Africa/LatAm $5,000M*4.0x (Mali Loulo/Tanzania/Veladero jurisdiction-discounted) + copper Lumwana+Reko Diq $1,500M*5.0x, add net cash $2.4B, less closure/reclamation adj $1.5B, /1,675 = $45.6. Conservative vs Street PT $55.25.

Mali political/Tanzania risk-discounted vs sector ~6x; reflects Loulo-Gounkoto suspension overhang

sop_components.basis: Copper producer/developer comps ~5-6x; Lumwana doubling to 240kt by 2027, Reko Diq optionality

BBIO.valuation_basis: BBP-418 (LGMD2I/R9) PDUFA Nov 27 2026 under Priority Review (FDA acceptance PR May 27 2026); positive Ph3 FORTIFY interim = statistically significant 2.6-pt NSAD benefit vs placebo at 12mo. CRITICAL re-frame: BBIO is NOT a cash-barbell biotech — net debt ~$2.5B (royalty/term debt funding launch), negative book equity per FMP 3/31/26 BS (totalDebt $3.385B, cash+inv ~$1.00B). The DOWNSIDE FLOOR is therefore the standalone value of the ALREADY-APPROVED, launched acoramidis/Attruby ATTR-CM franchise (FY25 net rev $362.4M, Q1-26 rev $194.5M annualizing ~$700M+, bull peak >$3B) plus infigratinib (achondroplasia NDA Q3-26) — not cash/sh. BBP-418 is incremental optionality on a de-risked commercial core ('convergence': the big asset already cleared). win_prob 0.85 = Priority Review + positive pivotal + first-in-disease unmet need. target_on_win $105 = FMP consensus $105.21 (median $100); downside_on_loss $58 ~ franchise-only value on a BBP-418 CRL (modest pipeline haircut, near pre-catalyst/200d avg $66.6, franchise intact). EV% barbell: 0.85*(105-67.25)+0.15*(58-67.25) = +$30.7/sh (~+46%). reference_rr=(105-67.25)/(67.25-58)=4.08.
BBIO.prob_basis: Priority Review granted (FDA acceptance May 27 2026) + positive Ph3 FORTIFY interim (2.6pt NSAD, p<0.05, benefit across all subgroups) + first/only therapy for any LGMD form (high unmet need favors approval). Haircut from ~0.90 reflects single-pivotal + accelerated-pathway label/CMC risk.

BHF.valuation_basis: Merger-arb: definitive agreement signed 2025-11-06, Aquarian Capital to acquire BHF for $70.00/sh all-cash ($4.1B). Stockholders approved ~99.7% on 2026-02-12. ONLY remaining gate = state insurance-regulatory approvals (no antitrust/financing risk). Undisturbed price = $51.80 (close 2025-11-05, last full day pre-announcement; consistent w/ $70 = 37.7% premium to 90d VWAP ~$50.83). Gross spread at $62.42 = $7.58 = 12.1% to deal. break_prob 0.12 reflects insurance-regulatory (multi-state, slow but reliably approved for going-private of a standalone insurer kept intact under existing mgmt) — not deal-block risk. reference_rr=(70-62.42)/(62.42-51.80)=0.71 (asymmetric: 12% up vs 17% down, typical late-stage reg arb where downside is the tail). valuation_asof 2026-06-08.

BHVN.valuation_basis: Single FORWARD binary: opakalim/BHV-7000 (selective Kv7.2/7.3 activator) topline from the FIRST of TWO pivotal Ph2/3 refractory-focal-epilepsy studies, 2H-2026. Supportive prior data: 54% achieved >=50% seizure reduction over 6mo, triple time-to-seizure, low CNS-AE / differentiated tolerability (>1000 subjects). Textbook single-readout-without-clear-mispricing: won't register on one study, and epilepsy adjunctive trials carry placebo-response variance. Cash $351.8M (3/31/26) / 105.865M sh = $3.32/sh — but BHVN retains multiple shots (Graves', IgAN, SMA-adjacent) so a miss does NOT cut to cash. win_prob 0.55 = Kv7 mechanism clinically validated (ezogabine precedent) + strong Ph2 effect, discounted for single-study + placebo risk + need to confirm in study 2. target_on_win $18 ~ FMP consensus median $18 (cons $17.6); downside_on_loss $6 (re-rates down hard but residual pipeline+cash floor >$3.32 cash). EV barbell: 0.55*(18-11.18)+0.45*(6-11.18)= +$1.42/sh (~+13% EV, but high variance). reference_rr (EV%)=(18-11.18)/(11.18-6)=1.32.
BHVN.prob_basis: Kv7.2/7.3 mechanism de-risked by ezogabine/retigabine precedent + opakalim Ph2 efficacy (54% >=50% responders, well tolerated). Capped at 0.55 because this is FIRST of two registration studies (no filing on a single readout) and adjunctive focal-epilepsy placebo response is a known confounder.

BLTE.valuation_basis: Tinlarebant (oral RBP4 antagonist) for Stargardt (STGD1): rolling NDA initiated Apr 21 2026, Q2-2026 submission-completion guidance. Pivotal Ph3 DRAGON POSITIVE (n=104, statistically significant ~36% reduction in retinal-lesion growth rate, favorable safety). Designations: Breakthrough + Fast Track + Rare-Pediatric + Orphan (US/EU/JP) + Sakigake. So the binary is more approval-timing/label than efficacy — efficacy already cleared. Cash+ST+LT investments ~$772.6M (12/31/25: $352.9M+$139.5M+$280.2M) / 40.085M sh = $19.27/sh cash. win_prob 0.78 = positive pivotal + 4 expedited designations sharply de-risk approval; residual = first-disease-precedent/CMC/single-pivotal-adequacy risk. target_on_win $208 = FMP consensus (high $217/low $191, median $215). downside_on_loss $60: NOT cash ($19) — a CRL/delay with positive Stargardt data + GA (PHOENIX) read-through would re-rate to ~yearLow $56 area, not to liquidation. But note asymmetry: at $139 the stock already prices most of the win (49% upside to $208) vs ~57% downside to $60. EV barbell: 0.78*(208-139.31)+0.22*(60-139.31)= +$36.1/sh (~+26% EV). reference_rr=(208-139.31)/(139.31-60)=0.87.
BLTE.prob_basis: Positive pivotal Ph3 DRAGON (met primary, ~36% lesion-growth reduction, clean safety) + Breakthrough/Fast Track/RPD/Orphan designations de-risk the approval path; discounted from ~0.85 for single-pivotal adequacy in a first-ever-approved indication and CMC/rolling-review execution.

CLBK.valuation_basis: Second-step thrift conversion arb (NOT a plain cash-merger; CLBK is the converting acquirer of NFBK). Per NFBK DEFM14A: each existing PUBLIC Columbia Financial (CLBK) share is exchanged for 1.8729 (min) to 2.5340 (max) new shares, MIDPOINT 2.2035, valued at the $10.00/sh second-step offering price -> implied pro-forma value $18.73 / $22.04 (mid) / $25.34 per existing CLBK share. Appraised full-conversion value $2.291B at midpoint (RP Financial). 'deal_price' (re-rate target) = $22.04 = midpoint exchange (2.2035 x $10); CLBK at $20.64 trades just below midpoint exchange value, and post-raise pro-forma P/TBV sits below peers (mgmt: 'buying in at a discount on pro-forma P/TBV') giving additional re-rate room. Undisturbed price = $16.27 (close 2026-01-30, last day before Feb-2 announcement) = floor. Gates largely cleared: OCC approved 5/4/26, Fed conditional approval 5/8/26 (FRB Order 2026-14); NFBK holder vote 6/25/26; close early Q3-2026. break_prob 0.08 (regulatory approvals in hand; residual = vote + conversion-offering minimum-sale & timing). reference_rr=(22.04-20.64)/(20.64-16.27)=0.32 (low ratio: most of the conversion uplift already captured at $20.64; thesis is book-value-discount + completion, not the spread).

CNNE.valuation_basis: Discount-to-NAV narrowing via buyback funded by non-core asset sales: Board authorized 14.9M-share buyback (Mar 6 2026) vs 52.4M sh out, funded by $630M D&B sale + Paysafe/System1/Sightline divestitures + $55M tax refund (summer 2026); ~34% of shares already retired since Feb-2024. Company-published SoP NAV $24.31/sh (Feb 23 2026 8-K, after 21% tax on unrealized gains) -> that is the COMPANY/advocacy ceiling, NOT my fair value. My fair value applies a 30% holdco/illiquidity discount (BKFC $5.60/sh private sports, Sightline/Watkins/Minden illiquid; Cannae historically ~40% discount, narrowing): $24.31*0.70 = $17.0, matching lone Street PT $17. Build: gross stake equity value $24.31*52.4M = $1,274M (marks already net of CNNE's $68M net debt), less holdco-discount adj $383M, /52.4 = $17.0.

sop_components.segment: Aggregate portfolio NAV (BKFC 42% $5.60 + Alight $2.59 + System1 $2.01 + Sightline $2.00 + Watkins $1.71 + Minden $1.27 + JANA $1.07 + SpaceX $1.21 + cash/other)
sop_components.basis: Cannae Feb-23-2026 8-K SoP table, $24.31/sh post-21%-tax NAV * 52.4M sh

DBRG.valuation_basis: Cash merger arb. SoftBank affiliate $16.00/sh all-cash take-private of DigitalBridge; shareholder vote PASSED Apr 23 2026 (~96% of votes cast, 121.18M sh). Pending only regulatory approvals (US antitrust + foreign-investment/sectoral incl. CFIUS on data-center infra) plus client consents >=85% of base-date fee revenue. Mgmt guides close 2H 2026. Live $15.67 vs $16.00 -> $0.33 gross spread (~2.1%), ~4-5% annualized to a 2H'26 close.
DBRG.prob_basis: Break ~12%: signed definitive, overwhelming vote done, no financing condition (SoftBank balance sheet). Residual risk is cross-border regulatory (CFIUS/FDI review of a US digital-infra manager bought by a Japanese acquirer) + the 85% client-consent condition on an asset-management franchise where LP consents can be sticky. Undisturbed = $13.91 (Dec 26 2025 close, pre-Dec 29 announcement; deal struck at 15% premium to that and 50% to unaffected 52wk avg $10.67).

DDL.valuation_basis: Forced capital return. Definitive SPA to sell 100% of Dingdong Fresh Holding (substantially all China ops) to Two Hearts Investments (Meituan unit) for $717M equity transfer ($645.3M at close + $71.7M deferred post tax/leakage), plus up to ~$280M of additional cash via net-cash/working-capital/debt-like adjustments (~$997M potential). Shareholder resolution (Mar 27 2026 AGM passed) authorizes board to deploy >=90% of post-close cash to buybacks/dividends. Base case distributable = 0.90 x $717M = $645M / 216.5M ADS = ~$2.98/ADS; residual stub ~$0.20 (retained 10% cash + listed shell). Live $2.425 (mkt cap ~$525M) sits below the cash haul.
DDL.prob_basis: Gating risk = China SAMR anti-monopoly clearance + NDRC filing on the Meituan transaction; ADS unit count 216.5M (ADS:ordinary = 2:3, traded/quoted unit = ADS). Conservative cash bridge: the RMB3,210.6M (~$447M) net cash largely sits INSIDE the China entity being sold, so distributable cash ~= the $717M proceeds, not proceeds+existing. Upside: if adjustments add ~$150M, return rises toward ~$3.50/ADS. Floor = undisturbed ~$1.90 (pre-announcement level; 52wk low $1.65).

ESPR.valuation_basis: Cash-plus-CVR merger arb. ARCHIMED affiliate to acquire ESPR for $3.16/sh cash at closing PLUS one non-tradeable CVR worth up to $100M (~$0.50/sh on ~200M dil sh): $40M (~$0.20/sh) if CY2027 US net sales of bempedoic acid (NEXLETOL/NEXLIZET) > $350M, plus a bumetanide (ENBUMYST) sales milestone. Signed definitive (announced May 1 2026), NO financing condition, unanimous board, close expected Q3 2026. deal_price = $3.16 cash + risk-adjusted CVR ~$0.13 = ~$3.29. Live $3.15 = essentially at the cash floor, so the CVR is ~free optionality.
ESPR.prob_basis: Break ~7%: signed, no financing condition, idiosyncratic (single-bidder PE take-private of a commercial-stage specialty pharma), only shareholder + customary regulatory left. CVR risk-adjustment: bempedoic CVR ~$0.20 max x ~55% (2025 total rev already $403M, so >$350M bempedoic US in 2027 is plausible-but-not-certain) ~= $0.11; bumetanide milestone ~$0.03 risk-adjusted (newer/smaller product) -> CVR PV ~$0.13. Undisturbed $2.00 (upfront $3.16 cash = stated 58% premium to Apr 30 2026 close).

FBIN.valuation_basis: Full-company SoP unlock thesis driven by Trian/Ed Garden (8-K Feb 22 2026 nominations + ~$113M stake) and the May 27 2026 formal strategic review of Fiberon (Business Wire/8-K). Normalized FY2025 segment EBITDA (sales x normalized margin, off the fire-depressed actual): Water Innovations $2,447.6M x 22% = $538.5M @ 12x (Masco-plumbing/premium-water comp); Outdoors $1,323M x 14% = $185.2M @ 11x blend (Fiberon decking comps Trex/AZEK 13-16x, dragged by door/entry mix); Security $692.6M x 14% = $97.0M @ 9x (mature Master Lock/Yale). Sum EV $9,372.2M - net debt $2,739.8M (incl. cap leases) - $200M leakage/stranded-cost & tax adj = $6,432.4M / 119.3M sh = $53.92. No public Trian price target disclosed, so no advocacy ceiling. Floor = de-rated no-deal conglomerate on depressed actual EBITDA $714.6M @ 9x.

sop_components.basis: FY2025 sales $2,447.6M x 22% norm EBITDA margin; 12x vs Masco plumbing/premium water comps (8-K fbin-ex99_1 FY2025)
FY2025 sales $1,323M x 14% norm EBITDA (off fire-depressed 6.3% op mgn); 11x blend, Fiberon decking comps Trex/AZEK 13-16x diluted by door mix; Fiberon bought 2018 for $470M
FY2025 sales $692.6M x 14% norm EBITDA; 9x mature hardware/security comp

FMC.valuation_basis: Single-segment (pure-play crop protection) take-out SoP. Feb-4-2026 board authorization to explore strategic options incl. sale of the company (FMC IR/8-K); CEO Brondeau in talks w/ 5-10 buyers (corporate + PE), per Motley Fool Apr-8-2026. 2026 guidance Adj EBITDA $670-730M (mid $700M, down 17% on price); revenue $3.60-3.80B (PRNewswire Q1 Apr-29-2026). Take-out: $700M EBITDA x 9.5x (slight premium to BASF 8.6x EV/EBITDA & below ag median 10.2x, control + new-molecule pipeline buyers want) = EV $6,650M - net debt $4,265.7M - minority $27.8M = $2,356.5M / 125.3M = $18.81. Floor = de-rated no-deal levered standalone on trough EBITDA $700M @ 7.0x (below peer median) = $4,900M - 4,265.7M - 27.8M = $606.5M / 125.3M = $4.84; the thin levered equity sliver means $11.085 already embeds heavy deal hope.

sop_components.basis: 2026 guide Adj EBITDA mid $700M; 9.5x take-out vs BASF 8.6x EV/EBITDA + ag median 10.2x (control premium + pipeline); buyers 5-10 per CEO Apr-2026

GBTG.valuation_basis: Merger-arb, ALL-CASH (financial sponsor Long Lake, backed by General Catalyst/Alpha Wave) -> consideration fixed at $9.50/sh, NOT a stock/mixed deal so no acquirer-price substitution. Definitive agreement May-4-2026 (businesswire), EV ~$6.3B. Board + Special Committee recommend (Rothschild fairness opinion); ~69% of shares locked via voting agreements (Amex, Expedia, QIA, BlackRock) -> shareholder vote near-certain. Gross spread = 9.50-9.355 = $0.145 (1.55%). Residual close risk = antitrust/CFIUS (QIA foreign-holder buyout, cross-border sponsor) + financing, not the vote. fair_value_target=deal_price $9.50; downside_floor=undisturbed $5.93 (May-1-2026 close implied by stated 60.2% premium). break_prob 0.10.
GBTG.prob_basis: All-cash strategic with 69% locked-up vote, board-recommended, fairness opinion; residual risk is regulatory (CFIUS/antitrust on foreign-holder buyout) + sponsor financing. Break ~10%.

GERN.valuation_basis: BARBELL on IMpactMF Ph3 interim OS readout, 2H-2026 (interim death-event trigger reconfirmed Q1 call May-6-2026; ~320 pts, 2:1 imetelstat vs BAT, OS PRIMARY endpoint -- first MF Ph3 with OS primary). NOT binary-to-zero: Rytelo already approved/commercial in MDS ($183.6M FY25 rev, $220-240M FY26 guide) provides a hard floor. win_prob 0.35 = BIO/Informa Ph3-oncology PoS ~35-40%, DISCOUNTED for the stringent O'Brien-Fleming interim-OS boundary, CREDITED for prior IMbark Ph2 OS trend + already-validated mechanism/MDS approval. target_on_win $3.75 (positive interim ~doubles peak-sales TAM by adding higher-value R/R-MF to MDS, likely M&A interest; 641M sh). downside_on_loss $0.85 (MDS franchise + $314M cash/STI but sentiment-crushed; well above bare cash floor $0.49). EV = .35*3.75 + .65*0.85 = $1.865 -> +63% vs ref $1.1414.
GERN.prob_basis: Ph3 oncology PoS 35-40% (BIO/Informa) at interim w/ OS-primary; discounted for stringent interim-OS efficacy boundary, credited for Ph2 IMbark OS signal + validated mechanism (MDS-approved). Calibrated 0.35.

IBRX.valuation_basis: BARBELL on ANKTIVA+BCG sBLA LABEL-EXPANSION to BCG-unresponsive papillary-only NMIBC; FDA-accepted, PDUFA Jan-6-2027 (verified, ImmunityBio PR). NOT a survival binary: ANKTIVA is ALREADY FDA-approved/commercial in CIS NMIBC -> drug, manufacturing & safety established; this is a regulatory extrapolation decision (CIS->papillary, QUILT-3.032 Cohort B + literature bridge). win_prob 0.55 = label-expansion approval rates ~70-80% for already-approved drugs, DISCOUNTED because efficacy rests on single-arm extrapolation not a randomized confirmatory trial (contested), but FDA's acceptance signals the bridge is reviewable. target_on_win $10.00 (papillary ~triples NMIBC TAM vs CIS-only; re-rate toward prior optimism, 52wk-high $12.43; ~1,047M sh). downside_on_loss $5.00 (CRL keeps CIS franchise + $380.9M cash/STI and a confirmatory-trial path; net debt $919M Oberland royalty). EV = .55*10 + .45*5 = $7.75 -> +8% vs ref $7.175 (mkt already prices most of it).
IBRX.prob_basis: Label-expansion of an already-approved drug (base rate ~70-80%) discounted to 0.55 for extrapolation-based (non-randomized) efficacy bridge from CIS to papillary; FDA sBLA acceptance is a partial de-risk.

IHS.valuation_basis: Merger-arb, ALL-CASH $8.50/sh ordinary share (target = IHS Holding NYSE:IHS; buyer = MTN Group). Definitive 17-Feb-2026 agreement, EV ~$6.2B; board-endorsed 25-May-2026, heads to London EGM (2/3-of-votes-cast threshold). Vote highly likely: MTN's existing 85.2M-sh stake + Wendel/Oranje-Nassau ~19.6% already committed to vote FOR. Gross spread = 8.50-8.305 = $0.195 (2.3%). Residual risk is structural/conditional: close depends on IHS completing LatAm tower+fiber disposals to satisfy MTN's cash conditions + African (Nigeria) regulatory/FX approvals -> higher than a vanilla US arb. break_prob 0.15. fair_value_target=deal $8.50; downside_floor=undisturbed ~$6.25 (pre-leak level; $8.50 was only ~3% over the rumor-inflated $8.23 Feb-4 close but a 36% premium to 52wk-VWAP, implying clean unaffected ~$6.25).
IHS.prob_basis: Board-endorsed all-cash with MTN's own stake + Wendel ~19.6% locked (2/3 EGM threshold near-met), but close is conditioned on IHS LatAm-disposal completion + Nigerian regulatory/FX approval -> EM/structural risk, break ~15%.

IMCR.valuation_basis: Bio-convergence barbell on TEBE-AM Phase 3 OS in 2L+ cutaneous melanoma (topline as early as 2H-2026 per Q1-2026 release, GlobeNewswire 2026-05-06) plus PRAME/brenetafusp 2H-2026 readouts. NOT a cash-shell: KIMMTRAK already approved, Q1-2026 net sales $106.7M (+14% YoY) ~ $427M run-rate, and the only positive Phase 3 OS in mUM is the platform precedent that partially de-risks the OS mechanism. win_prob=0.40 (Phase 3 oncology OS base rate ~0.35-0.45, lifted by mUM precedent and the positive signal that converted the 2/3 to registrational). target_on_win=$62 ~ Street avg consensus (Jefferies/DB ~$65, range to $100) on a de-risked multi-indication melanoma franchise + ~$500M incremental CM peak. downside_on_loss=$20: an OS miss removes CM optionality but the marketed mUM KIMMTRAK business + $844.9M cash/securities (~$16.6/sh) persist, so it compresses to ~$1B EV not to cash. Expected EV = 0.40*(62-27.87)+0.60*(20-27.87) = +$8.93/sh (+32%).
IMCR.prob_basis: Phase 3 oncology hard-endpoint (OS) historical success ~0.35-0.45; uplifted because tebentafusp already has the only positive Phase 3 OS in metastatic uveal melanoma (mechanism/platform precedent) and the Phase 2/3 was converted to a registrational Phase 3 only after a positive interim signal. Cite: Immunocore Q1-2026 PR, GlobeNewswire 2026-05-06; TEBE-AM conversion PR (immunocore.com release 90).

IMTX.valuation_basis: Bio-convergence barbell on SUPRAME Phase 3 (anzu-cel / IMA203 PRAME TCR-T vs investigator's choice in 2L+ cutaneous melanoma); pre-specified interim/final PFS analyses triggered in 2026, feeding 1H-2027 BLA. The 2026-06-01 ASCO Phase 1b update (56% cORR, 14.6mo mDOR, 6.1mo mPFS, 16.2mo mOS; GlobeNewswire 2026-06-01) materially de-risks vs ~10-15% response for investigator's choice. win_prob=0.45 (large Ph1b effect size implies high conditional PFS win, discounted for single-arm->randomized translation and cell-therapy manufacturing/execution risk). target_on_win=$20 ~ Street avg ($20.17; high $25) on a positive interim that supports BLA. downside_on_loss=$4 ~ net cash floor: Q1-2026 cash+STI EUR454M (~$490M; ~$3.65/sh) plus residual MAGE-A4/8 platform. ~134.1M sh. Expected EV = 0.45*(20-9.38)+0.55*(4-9.38) = +$1.82/sh (+19%); barbell +113% up vs -57% down.
IMTX.prob_basis: Phase 1b cORR 56% vs ~10-15% investigator's-choice benchmark is a very large delta; a randomized Ph3 PFS powered off that effect carries a high conditional probability, hauled down by translation risk (single-arm Ph1b -> randomized Ph3) and autologous cell-therapy manufacturing/logistics execution risk in a registrational setting. Cite: Immatics ASCO 2026 PR, GlobeNewswire 2026-06-01; Immatics Q1-2026 PR 2026-05-12.

IMXI.valuation_basis: Merger-arb: Western Union all-cash $16.00/sh (~$500M EV). Board-approved, shareholder-approved (2026-12-09... 2025-12-09), HSR expired 2025-10-06, 51 of 52 U.S. state/territory money-transmitter approvals and ALL international approvals received; one U.S. state consent pending. Original outside date 2026-05-11 already lapsed -> extended to 2026-08-10 (further to 2026-11-10) pending the final license. Gross spread $16.00-$15.21 = $0.79 (5.2%). break_prob=0.08 reflects a highly de-risked, fully-funded all-cash deal with only one remaining state money-transmitter consent, but the slipped outside date and the SWEEP-10 flag that this is NOT a clean thin-spread arb (single remaining regulatory consent + timing drift) keep residual risk above a trivial level. fair_value_target=deal $16.00; downside_floor=undisturbed ~$11.00 (pre-bid IMXI; ~50% premium struck mid-2025, yearLow $8.58). Cite: WU/Intermex HSR-expiry PR (stocktitan); IMXI 10-Q FY2026 (sec.gov imxi-20260331).

ITGR.valuation_basis: Single-segment medtech CDMO take-out SoP. Board launched strategic review Apr 30 2026 (GlobeNewswire/8-K) weighing sale/merger vs standalone, driven by activist Irenic Capital (>3% stake, urges board refresh + sale). Forward 2026E EBITDA ~$355M (TTM $328.4M growing mid-single-digit + ramp) x 13.5x (low end of 13-14x precedent-CDMO band cited supporting $110-125/sh; trades ~10x today) = EV $4,792.5M - net debt $1,373.3M = $3,419.2M / 34.0M = $100.56. No public Irenic $ target, so no advocacy ceiling; my $100.5 sits below the cited $110-125 street/precedent range (conservative on both multiple and forward EBITDA). Floor = de-rated no-deal standalone at 9x forward $355M = $3,195M - 1,373.3M = $1,821.7M / 34.0M = $53.6 (below 52-wk low $62, stripping review premium). Name has already largely re-rated ($62 low to $92), so own R:R is thin.

sop_components.basis: 2026E EBITDA $355M (TTM $328.4M growing); 13.5x = low end of 13-14x precedent CDMO transactions cited supporting $110-125/sh vs ~10x current

KDP.valuation_basis: Committed spin into BevCo + Global Coffee Co (US-listed, named CEOs Cofer/Oliveira, leverage targets BevCo 3.5-4x, Coffee 3.75-4.25x), readiness by YE2026 (proxy DEF 14A + 8-K). FY2025 segment AOI: US Refreshment Bev $3.1B, US Coffee $1.233B, Intl $556M (total $4.156B; KDP Q4 release Feb-24-2026). SoP: BevCo EBITDA ~$3.9B (EBIT ~$3.5B + D&A) @ 16x (conservative vs KO/PEP/MNST 17-20x EV/EBITDA, and vs the 20x-EBIT street SoP) = $62.4B; Global Coffee Co EBITDA ~$3.0B (US Coffee + JDE Peet's, EBIT ~$2.5B) @ 10x (JDE Peet's/Nestle-coffee comp, integration complexity) = $30.0B. Sum EV $92.4B - pro forma net debt $33.0B (post-JDE Peet's ~4.5x combined) - minority $3,921M = $55,479M / 1,471M diluted sh (incl. ~121M from convert pfd) = $37.72. Floor = de-rated no-spin levered conglomerate at 11x blended on ~$7.2B combined EBITDA = $79.2B - 36.9B = $42,279M / 1,471M = $28.7.

sop_components.segment: Beverage Co (BevCo: Dr Pepper/Snapple/CSD + intl bev)
sop_components.basis: FY2025 US RB AOI $3.1B + intl, EBIT ~$3.5B + D&A -> ~$3.9B EBITDA; 16x conservative vs KO/PEP/MNST 17-20x and 20x-EBIT street SoP
US Coffee AOI $1.233B + JDE Peet's, combined EBIT ~$2.5B -> ~$3.0B EBITDA; 10x vs JDE Peet's/Nestle-coffee comp, integration drag

LNTH.valuation_basis: Merger-arb on Curium's ~$7.0B unsolicited takeover PROPOSAL (Bloomberg, May 22 2026). $7.0B equity proposal / 65.106M sh out (10-Q 3/31/26) = ~$107.5/sh headline deal proxy. Truist (May 26 2026) called $7B 'light' vs ~$6.7B mkt cap and flagged $115-125 as a 'more palatable' takeout, implying a likely bump. deal_price=$107.50 (the $7B on the table; upside optionality to $115-125 on a raise). undisturbed=$94.47 (May 21 2026 close, day before the Bloomberg report; stock was already low-90s standalone on PYLARIFY strength). This is a PROPOSAL not a signed merger: board 'actively evaluating', decision reportedly ~weeks away (~June 29 2026), no guarantee of a deal -> elevated break risk despite the existing Curium-Lantheus partnership.
LNTH.prob_basis: Unsolicited proposal under active board review (no signed agreement, no LOI disclosed); offsetting de-risk = pre-existing Curium-Lantheus commercial partnership + Truist read that price is 'light' (bump more likely than walk). Net ~60% deal / 40% break.

MANU.valuation_basis: Merger-arb on a STRUCTURAL drag-along, not an announced deal. MANU NYSE proxy documents a $33.00/sh floor protecting Ratcliffe's ~29% stake only if a FULL club sale closes before Feb 2027; after that the Glazers can drag him at any price -> a dated incentive for the Glazers to sell before Feb-2027. deal_price=$33.00 (the documented price a pre-deadline full sale must clear). undisturbed=$17.00 (~200-day avg; the cleaner no-deal base, since the stock has been bid up on sale speculation for months and the 50-day is already $18.46). Trigger to date is only a Bloomberg report (June 4 2026) that Glazers are 'debating' a sale -> NO bidder, NO LOI, NO signed deal. Very high break prob: probability a full sale at >=$33 actually closes before Feb-2027 is low.
MANU.prob_basis: No announced transaction/bidder; thesis rests on a documented drag-along incentive + a 'Glazers debating sale' press report. Class A shares carry ~no votes, so the $33 is a control-deal floor not a guaranteed public takeout. ~25% a qualifying full sale clears at/above the floor before the Feb-2027 deadline.

MIRM.valuation_basis: BARBELL on the zilurgisertib (ALK2i, partnered w/ Incyte) FOP catalyst: pivotal PROGRESS Cohort-1 data at ENDO Jun-14-2026 + FDA Priority-Review PDUFA Sep-26-2026. CRITICAL: MIRM is a PROFITABLE COMMERCIAL company, not a cash shell -> 2026 net-sales guide raised to $660-680M (LIVMARLI +55% YoY; Baird PT $129, Outperform). 50.199M sh out; net debt ~$0 (cash+ST inv $386M vs total debt $324M, Q1'26). target_on_win=$125 (toward Baird $129; FOP de-risked + growing base franchise). downside_on_loss=$75 is the STANDALONE COMMERCIAL floor (NOT cash) ~ a haircut to the bile-acid/LIVMARLI business below the $84.68 200-day, since FOP is incremental and Incyte-partnered. EV = 0.65*125 + 0.35*75 = $107.5 vs $92.79 ref = +15.9%.
MIRM.prob_basis: FDA accepted the NDA under Priority Review on the Cohort-1 placebo-controlled pivotal package -> sponsors/FDA see an approvable dataset (de-risks the readout); residual binary is whether the disclosed efficacy magnitude impresses. Win prob ~0.65. Downside is cushioned by a $670M-sales standalone business, so the 'loss' leg is a commercial revaluation, not cash.

NMRA.valuation_basis: Lottery-ticket BARBELL on navacaprant (kappa-opioid antagonist, MDD): KOASTAL-2 and KOASTAL-3 (each >400 pts, ~25% over the original 332 target) JOINT topline in 2Q26 (reaffirmed Jan-5 & May-2026). KEY: KOASTAL-1 ALREADY FAILED its MADRS primary + key SHAPS secondary -> these are optimized re-runs of the SAME mechanism. 185.28M sh out; net cash ~$146.7M (cash $147.1M vs $0.4M debt, Q1'26) = ~$0.79/sh; stock $1.6151 (~2x net cash, near $0.716 52-wk low). target_on_win=$6.00 (~3.7x re-rate; a clean win resurrects a multi-bn MDD asset, exceeding the $3.65 52-wk high). downside_on_loss=$0.75 (~net cash/sh; the 52-wk low sits right at cash). EV = 0.20*6.00 + 0.80*0.75 = $1.80 vs $1.6151 = +11.4%.
NMRA.prob_basis: Low base rate: KOASTAL-1 missed the MADRS primary; re-running the same KOR mechanism in MDD after a Ph3 pivotal failure historically succeeds ~20-25%. Win prob ~0.20. Massive variance barbell (win +271% / loss -54% to cash); only marginally positive EV.

OLMA.valuation_basis: Cash-backed BARBELL on OPERA-01: palazestrant (oral CERAN/SERD) MONOTHERAPY topline 'in the fall of 2026' (Q1'26 release, May-12-2026) in 2/3L ER+/HER2- mBC post-CDK4/6, ALL-COMERS (not ESR1-restricted) vs SOC endocrine. Not yet reported / not re-rated (stock $9.99 near $3.89 52-wk low, well below $14.5/$16.8 50/200-day). 87.35M sh out; net cash ~$504M (cash+ST inv $505.3M vs $1.0M debt, Q1'26) = ~$5.77/sh. target_on_win=$24.00 (positive all-comers monotherapy -> 2027 launch + OPERA-02 frontline + Novartis/Kisqali validation; toward prior $36 high range). downside_on_loss=$6.50 (modest premium to $5.77 net cash for residual combo/frontline + KAT6 optionality). EV = 0.40*24 + 0.60*6.50 = $13.50 vs $9.99 = +35.1%.
OLMA.prob_basis: Oral-SERD class read-through is mixed: elacestrant (Orserdu) won mainly in ESR1-mut and several oral SERDs missed the monotherapy/all-comers bar -> high bar for OPERA-01. Tempered by palazestrant Ph2 PFS (7.3mo ESR1-mut / 5.5mo WT) + Novartis frontline collaboration. Win prob ~0.40; downside heavily cushioned by $5.77/sh net cash -> attractive cash-backed skew (win +140% / loss -35%).

PZZA.valuation_basis: Merger-arb on a PROCESS, not a signed deal. Irth Capital (Qatari-backed, Brookfield support) reported $47/sh cash take-private (Bloomberg Mar-11-2026; Reuters 'advanced discussions' Apr-15-2026; WSJ). NO definitive merger agreement as of early Jun-2026; June-1-2026 shareholder fiduciary-duty investigation (Purcell & Lefkowitz). deal_price=$47 (cash consideration). undisturbed=$32.54 (Mar-10-2026 close, last before the $47 report; stock jumped to $38.86 Mar-11). CRITICAL: two PRIOR higher bids already collapsed — Apollo/Irth $60 (Jun-2025) and Apollo $64 (Oct-2025) — and the stock at $31.69 has fully round-tripped BELOW undisturbed, i.e. the market prices a LOW probability the $47 closes. break_prob=0.70. Downside floor set at $30 standalone support (early-Mar base $30.70-31.01), below spot, because failed-deal history means the realistic fall-back is the standalone trading range, not the $32.54 disturbed level. Spread is wide (~48% gross) precisely because success-prob is low; edge is break-prob-driven not gap-driven.

REPL.valuation_basis: BARBELL on RP1 (vusolimogene oderparepvec)+nivolumab in advanced melanoma. Twice-rejected: CRL Jul-21-2025 (FDA: single-arm IGNYTE 'not adequate & well-controlled,' heterogeneous population, IGNYTE-3 confirmatory design issues — a substantial-evidence problem, source: Dermatology Times / Scientific American Jul-2025) and a second setback Apr-2026. May-29-2026 (GlobeNewswire/8-K) FDA ALIGNED on resubmission of SAME dataset with prioritized/urgent review — driven by FDA-leadership/political will (Makary/Prasad unmet-need push), NOT new efficacy data. win_prob=0.50 CALIBRATED: pure-merits coin-flip-or-worse (same-data substantial-evidence risk unresolved) lifted by FDA's stated intent to prioritize; cross-checks to market-implied (at $8.905 with floor $2.25/target $16, implied p=(8.905-2.25)/(16-2.25)=0.48). target_on_win=$16 (commercial melanoma franchise, peak US sales ~$0.5-0.75B at ~2-3x peak on de-risked launch + pipeline; pre-CRL traded $10-15+). downside_on_loss=$2.25 = net cash/sh (cash+ST inv $269M, debt $76M, net cash ~$193M /82.6M sh ≈ $2.34 less ~6mo burn; note panic floor undershot to $1.50 52-wk low post-CRL).
REPL.prob_basis: May-29-2026 FDA alignment on resubmission + prioritized/urgent review (positive regulatory-will signal) offset by twice-rejected single-arm 'not adequate & well-controlled' substantial-evidence deficiency on the SAME data; calibrated to coin-flip and cross-checked to market-implied ~0.48

RLMD.valuation_basis: BARBELL on NDV-01 intravesical immunotherapy in BCG-unresponsive NMIBC (company pivoted from failed REL-1017 depression program). Dated catalyst = INITIAL 3-MONTH CR from Phase 3 RESCUE 2L BCG-unresponsive arm, guided YE-2026 (Q1-2026 update, biospace/Relmada). This is an EARLY/EASY de-risking endpoint, not approval: Ph2 already showed 76-80% durable 12-mo CR and 94-95% CR at any time, so 3-mo CR (a high-bar-passing endpoint) is likely supportive. win_prob=0.65 CALIBRATED (strong Ph2 read-through to an early CR timepoint; tempered because it is a single-arm registrational with execution/enrollment risk and the readout is only initial). target_on_win=$11 (hot NMIBC space — comps cretostimogene/CG Oncology, ImmunityBio Anktiva approved, Ferring Adstiladrin; de-risked single asset re-rates EV to ~$0.4-0.6B+ on 73.3M sh atop $234M cash). downside_on_loss=$3.50: cash $234M (Mar-31-2026, runway to 2029) = $3.19/sh hard floor PLUS residual since a soft early print does not zero the asset (cash-rich, asset survives). reference_rr is binary EV%: EV=0.65*11+0.35*3.50=$8.375, (8.375-5.805)/5.805=+0.443.
RLMD.prob_basis: Phase 2 76-80% durable 12-mo CR (94-95% any-time CR) read-through to the easy initial 3-month CR endpoint of Phase 3 RESCUE; single-arm registrational + execution risk caps it below high-conviction

SID.valuation_basis: Deleveraging/equity-recovery on CSN (NYSE ADR, 1:1 to CSNA3). Board-authorized, 6-K-disclosed plan (Jan-2026) to cut gross debt R$16-18B by selling CONTROL of CSN Cimentos (Morgan Stanley advising; whole-co value mooted ~US$3B / 17Mt, 7 plants; bidders Votorantim, J&F, Anhui Conch, Huaxin, Sinoma) plus CSN Infra stake; binding bids end-Jun-2026, signing Q3/Q4-2026. Net debt R$40.5B at 1Q26 (3.36x LTM EBITDA; FMP TTM R$38.2B); plan takes net debt/EBITDA 3.14x->1.83x and cuts interest ~R$1.8B/yr. Light SoP/NAV cross-check (USD/BRL~5.0): CMIN stake ~69% x ~R$28B mktcap = R$19.3B + CSN Cimentos stake ~R$13B + steel/logistics/energy EV ~R$15-20B (~4x EBITDA) = ~R$47-52B gross, less net debt ~R$40B less minority R$3B = thin equity ~R$6-12B vs current mktcap ~R$8.5B ($1.545B x5). Equity is a heavily-levered sliver (~5:1 net debt:equity, $7.6B vs $1.5B) so deleveraging is highly accretive on %; recovery_value=$1.85 = re-rate toward upper recent range (1yr high $2.20) as the over-leverage/holdco discount narrows + R$1.8B/yr interest saving flows to equity. Floor=current distressed level ~$1.15 (52-wk low $1.11).
SID.instrument_ref: SID ADR (NYSE; 1 ADR = 1 CSNA3 ordinary share); common equity, ~1,326M shares

SLS.valuation_basis: BARBELL on imminent Phase 3 REGAL OS topline. Galinpepimut-S (GPS, WT1 peptide immunotherapy) as MAINTENANCE vs investigator's choice in 2L-CR AML. Event-driven OS trial: 78 of 80 pre-specified death events confirmed as of May-11-2026 (Q1-2026 release / 8-K GlobeNewswire), final analysis on the 80th event -> topline imminent (any day). IDMC cleared the pre-specified interim with NO futility stop; interim pooled median OS appeared >=13.5 mo vs ~6 mo historical control (encouraging but 'continue' != efficacy). win_prob=0.45 CALIBRATED: OS-powered Phase 3 past an IDMC interim leans toward but the small event count (80), single-asset micro-cap, and a long-doubted program keep it just under a coin flip. target_on_win=$16 (first WT1 immunotherapy to clear Ph3 AML; transformational/partnership-grade; stock already ran $1.39->$9+ on anticipation). downside_on_loss=$1.50: net cash $106M (Mar-31-2026)=$0.75/sh hard floor PLUS WT1-platform residual (based at $1.39 pre-run; could undershoot toward $1 on a clean miss). reference_rr is binary EV%: EV=0.45*16+0.55*1.50=$8.025, (8.025-8.17)/8.17=-0.018 — priced ~AT fair binary EV at $8.17, edge largely gone.
SLS.prob_basis: Phase 3 REGAL passed pre-specified OS interim with IDMC 'continue' (no futility) and interim median OS >=13.5mo vs ~6mo control; tempered by small 80-event count, single-asset micro-cap, long-skeptical program -> just under coin-flip

SRPT.valuation_basis: RECOVERY/turnaround on the ELEVIDYS franchise (NOT bankruptcy; Sarepta has $748.3M cash & investments and positive equity). The catalyst is FDA-approved ENDEAVOR Cohort 8 sirolimus immunosuppression study (approval 11/25/2025; dosing begun Apr 2026; primary-endpoint data H2-2026), the pathway to RE-ESTABLISH non-ambulant ELEVIDYS dosing after the safety-driven label restriction. recovery_value $26 = post-readout re-rate if non-ambulant dosing is restored (roughly doubles the addressable Duchenne population; lands in the upper half of the $5-$45 analyst dispersion, vs $19 median, conditioned on a POSITIVE Cohort 8 signal). 2026 product-rev guide $1.2-1.4B; mgmt cites a ~$500M/yr ELEVIDYS floor (Seeking Alpha 5/6/2026). Downside floor $10.50 = cash-and-PMO-backed distressed level: ~$7/sh net cash (cash+ST+LT inv $755M less net debt) PLUS the still-cash-generative PMO exon-skip franchise (Exondys/Amondys/Vyondys); near the $10.42 52-wk low. Sources: Sarepta IR Q1-2026 release (businesswire 5/6/2026); ENDEAVOR Cohort 8 approval (stocktitan/Sarepta IR); FMP Q1-2026 10-Q balance sheet. CAVEAT: barbell, not a clean ratio — a negative Cohort 8 readout (liver-injury signal recurs) caps ELEVIDYS at ambulant-only and the PMO franchise faces Dyne competition, so the floor is real downside, not a soft landing.
SRPT.instrument_ref: SRPT common equity (recovery on ENDEAVOR Cohort 8 sirolimus H2-2026 primary-endpoint readout re-establishing non-ambulant ELEVIDYS dosing)

TE.valuation_basis: LANE OVERRIDE / SCHEMA MISFIT: the dated catalyst is a ~$225M Phase-1 G2_Austin financing that is a capital RAISE, not a capital RETURN — no cash is being distributed to shareholders, so announced_return_per_share=0 and the post-event equity value is carried in residual_value. Catalyst: T1 targets a comprehensive Phase-1 financing solution (with a significant debt component) for the 2.1 GW G2_Austin solar-cell plant, still in diligence with a stated Q2-2026 (~June 30) target, gating Q4-2026 first-cell production (T1 IR/globenewswire Q1-2026 results 5/12/2026). fair_value_target $11.00 = residual post-financing re-rate IF the gap is closed with debt (removes dilution overhang, keeps Q4-2026 first-cell on track) — only modest upside because the stock has ALREADY run from a $1.06 52-wk low to $9.26 (+770%) on financing optimism + a 10M-sh Situational Awareness stake disclosure. downside_floor $5.50 = unfinanced/heavy-equity-dilution outcome reverting toward the 50-day avg $6.27 / 200-day $5.32; cash only $116.5M vs $433M net debt (FMP Q1-2026). HONEST READ: most upside is already captured; reference_rr ~0.46 is unattractive and the event could come as dilutive equity. NO clean comp for a pre-revenue solar-cell newbuild — floor widened accordingly. Sources: ad-hoc-news/Motley Fool/stocktitan (May 2026); FMP Q1-2026 balance sheet.

TMC.valuation_basis: BARBELL on the US commercial-recovery permit. win_prob 0.55 (CALIBRATED): NOAA found TMC USA's consolidated DSHMRA application in FULL compliance on 5/1/2026 and certified the USA-B exploration license on 5/28/2026 (65,000 km2 CCZ) — the two hardest regulatory gates are now substantially cleared; the commercial-recovery permit is guided by ~end-Q1-2027. >50/50 but held to 0.55 by (a) permit not yet ISSUED, (b) ISA/UNCLOS conflict + litigation risk, (c) remaining financing/offshore-execution gates. target_on_win $8.25 = re-rate to RISKED NORI-D value on permit grant: NORI-D PFS after-tax NPV $5.5B (51Mt probable reserves, 27% IRR) / 433.2M sh = $12.70 undiscounted, haircut ~35% for residual financing/execution/time-to-2031-steady-state risk. NOTE: the full NORI+TOML $23.6B NPV ($54/sh) is the deep-option dream, NOT the immediate re-rate. downside_on_loss $2.75 = permit denied/long-delayed -> reverts to cash ($120M, ~$0.28/sh) + retained ISA exploration-contract & resource optionality; below the $3.93 52-wk low but off zero. EV = 0.55*8.25 + 0.45*2.75 = $5.78 vs $5.17 ref -> +11.8% EV. prob_basis: NOAA full-compliance (5/1/2026) + USA-B license certification (5/28/2026), permit guidance ~Q1-2027. COMP: AMC Consultants PFS (metals.co 8/4/2025). Sources: TMC IR (investors.metals.co 5/1 & 5/28/2026); FMP Q1-2026 balance sheet.
TMC.prob_basis: NOAA full-compliance determination on TMC USA consolidated DSHMRA application (5/1/2026) + USA-B exploration-license certification over 65,000 km2 CCZ (5/28/2026); commercial-recovery permit guided ~end-Q1-2027. Held to 0.55 (more-likely-than-not) for permit-not-yet-issued + ISA/UNCLOS litigation risk.

TMHC.valuation_basis: All-cash merger arb. Berkshire Hathaway signed a definitive all-cash merger to acquire Taylor Morrison at $72.50/share (announced 5/31/2026; 8-K + PRNewswire), a 24% premium to the $58.50 close on 5/29/2026; ~$6.8B equity / ~$8.5B EV; close H2-2026; conditions = majority-of-outstanding-shares vote + HSR antitrust + customary. break_prob 0.05 (LOW): strategic acquirer (Berkshire, all-cash, NO financing condition), highly fragmented homebuilding (negligible antitrust risk), unanimous board approval, modest 24% premium (low re-cut/topping risk both ways). fair_value_target = deal_price $72.50; downside_floor = undisturbed $58.50 — cushioned: TMHC Q1-2026 BVPS ~$64 (Motley Fool transcript) sits ABOVE the undisturbed price, so book value is a near-floor backstop. Gross spread only ~1.4% (72.50 vs 71.50 ref) for ~13.0 pts of downside-if-break = classic high-probability/small-absolute-spread arb; prob-weighted ~$71.80 net. Sources: PRNewswire/TradingView/CNBC (5/31-6/1/2026); TMHC 8-K (SEC d111152dex991); FMP shares-float 92.07M.

VISN.valuation_basis: Signed Belden (BDC) Purchase Agreement Apr-29/30-2026 for RUCKUS at $1.846B cash, ~$1.7B net proceeds, special distribution of a significant portion within 60 days of H2-2026 close + $100M buyback (Business Wire/8-K; IBTimes Q1). RemainCo = Aurora Networks (broadband access), 2026 Adj EBITDA guide $225-250M (mid $237.5M), Q1 sales $298.4M +33% YoY. Current balance sheet already net CASH $2,444M (cash $2,510M, debt $66M), 225.57M sh. CAPITAL_RETURN: announced_return ~$1.5B (significant portion of $1.7B, retaining some for buyback/unlevered B/S) = $6.65/sh; residual = Aurora EV $237.5M x 9x = $2,137.5M + net cash credited $1,422M (RUCKUS retained $200M + 50% haircut on the contested pre-existing $2,444M pile, reflecting market skepticism on cash-return certainty) = $3,559.5M / 225.57M = $15.78. Target $6.65 + $15.78 = $22.43, corroborated by the ~$22 street target. Floor $9.50 = distribution delayed/reduced + Aurora trough 6x + cash pile deeply discounted (~20% below live), though signed deal + on-B/S cash cap real downside.

VRDN.valuation_basis: Binary on veligrotug (VRDN-001) BLA for thyroid eye disease; FDA accepted w/ Priority Review + Breakthrough, confirmed PDUFA action date June 30, 2026 (Viridian PR Dec 22, 2025; BusinessWire Jan 6, 2026). Approvable: Phase 3 met endpoints (diplopia resolution + proptosis), BTD granted May 2025. win_prob 0.90 (Ph3-positive BLA w/ BTD+Priority, base-rate ~85-90%). target_on_win $35 = post-approval re-rate in a ~$2B US TED market (Amgen Tepezza ~$2B/yr); Evercore peak $1.2B US/$1.4B WW, Street targets $19-61 (Truist $41 Buy, GS/Jefferies Buy); ~back toward 52wk-high $34.29 on launch + subQ VRDN-003/VRDN-003 optionality. downside_on_loss $8 = net-cash floor ($762.2M cash+STI - $51M debt = ~$711M / 116.8M as-conv sh = $6.09/sh) plus residual subQ pipeline value (CRL doesn't kill independent subQ program). As-converted shares 116.76M (102.46M common + 14.30M from pref conversion, 10-Q 3/31/26). BARBELL: +120% on win vs -50% on loss; EV@0.90 = 0.9*35+0.1*8 = $32.3 (+103%).
VRDN.prob_basis: Phase 3 THRIVE/THRIVE-2 positive (diplopia + proptosis endpoints met), Breakthrough Therapy + Priority Review granted; historical FDA approval base-rate for a Ph3-positive BLA carrying BTD is ~85-90%.

WVE.valuation_basis: Binary on FDA feedback (expected mid-2026, guided in Apr 28, 2026 Q1 update) on a potential accelerated-approval pathway for WVE-006 in alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency (AATD), after regaining full rights from GSK (Feb 2, 2026). This is a SOFT binary (pathway feedback, not an approval decision). Positive RestorAATion-2: wild-type M-AAT = 64% of total AAT, Z-AAT reduced 71%, 11.9-13.6 uM total AAT. win_prob 0.45 (regulatory-receptivity coin-flip; serum AAT is a plausible surrogate but AA precedent for RNA-editing is thin). target_on_win $11 = de-risked path to a large AATD market (~200k pts US/EU), platform validation, re-rate toward 200-day $10 / prior GSK-partnered level. downside_on_loss $3.50 = cash floor ($544.6M cash, net cash $528.9M / ~192.4M sh = $2.75/sh) + residual platform/other programs (GSK 4th DC selected Jan 2026). BARBELL: +91% win vs -39% loss; EV@0.45 = 0.45*11+0.55*3.5 = $6.88 (+19%).
WVE.prob_basis: FDA-pathway-feedback binary (not approval): positive RestorAATion-2 surrogate biomarker data supports an AA case, but regulatory acceptance of serum AAT as a surrogate for a first-in-class RNA-editing agent is unproven — ~coin-flip, slightly below 50%.

ZYME.valuation_basis: Binary on zanidatamab (Ziihera) sBLA in 1L HER2+ locally-advanced/metastatic gastroesophageal adenocarcinoma (GEA); FDA accepted w/ Priority Review + Breakthrough, PDUFA Aug 25, 2026 (Zymeworks Q1 PR May 7, 2026 + Jazz PR; HERIZON-GEA-01 Ph3 positive). NOT a pure barbell: Ziihera already approved in 2L BTC, so base business cushions a loss. win_prob 0.88 (supplemental BLA on an already-approved molecule, positive Ph3, Priority+BTD, Jazz partner). target_on_win $31 = $250M US approval milestone from Jazz (~$3.4/sh) + tiered royalties (10%->high-teens to $2B sales, 20% above) on a large 1L GEA market; royalty-NPV SOP re-rate toward 52wk-high $29.75. downside_on_loss $19 = far above $3.08/sh net cash ($403.8M cash+STI+LT-inv, net cash $227M / 73.6M sh) because 2L Ziihera approval, pipeline + other ex-US milestones (up to $440M near-term GEA) survive a 1L CRL. EV@0.88 = 0.88*31+0.12*19 = $29.6 (+24%); +30% win / -20% loss.
ZYME.prob_basis: Supplemental BLA on an already-FDA-approved molecule (Ziihera, 2L BTC) with positive pivotal HERIZON-GEA-01, Priority Review + Breakthrough, large-pharma partner Jazz; approval base-rate high (~88%).

ACLS.valuation_basis: Merger arb — Axcelis (ACQUIRER) all-stock acquisition of Veeco, 0.3575 ACLS per VECO share (announced Oct 1, 2025; both shareholder bases approved Feb 6, 2026). Sole remaining condition: China SAMR clearance; guided close 2H 2026. Deal-implied VECO = 0.3575*$156.88 = $56.08 vs VECO spot $61.67 (market pricing ACLS upside through close). For ACLS itself the catalyst is deal CLOSE = accretive combination: $35M run-rate cost synergies (within 24mo), non-GAAP EPS accretive yr-1, 2024 pro-forma $1.7B rev / $387M adj EBITDA / 44% GM. fair_value_target $175 = post-close ACLS capitalizing synergies (~$35M*20x ~ $700M / ~33M pro-forma sh ~ +$21/sh) + removal of deal-uncertainty discount, off $156.88 spot (already +6.6% today on SAMR optimism). downside_floor $120 = standalone-on-break: a SAMR block gives back the recent deal/announcement premium spike but NOT to the pre-bid undisturbed (~$85-95) since ACLS tripled off $60 52wk-low largely on fundamental ion-implant/semi recovery. break_prob 0.25 (China SAMR geopolitics + Kingstone-competitor bundling concerns the live risk). reference_rr = (175-156.88)/(156.88-120) = 0.49; EV@close-prob 0.75 = 0.75*175+0.25*120 = $161.25 (+2.8%) — ACLS has run hard, asymmetry now thin.

BZH.valuation_basis: Contested/hostile merger-arb. Dream Finders (DFH) made three all-cash bids: $28.50 (Feb), $29.00 (Mar), then a REDUCED $25.75 (May 5); Beazer board REJECTED all (May 11, businesswire) citing book value $41.83/sh; DFH reaffirmed the $25.75 proposal via investor presentation May 21 (shareholder-persuasion campaign, possible proxy/tender). No signed deal, no agreed price, no firm close date -> high break risk. deal_price=$25.75 (only live consideration on the table); undisturbed=$18.35 (DFH-cited May-5 pre-bid BZH close). Stock $26.01 trades ABOVE the rejected bid because the market prices either a raised bid or the $41.83 standalone book -> the bull case is standalone NAV, not the deal. break_prob 0.60 (rejected + reduced bid + board dug in on book = more likely to break/re-trade than close as-is). reference_rr=(25.75-26.01)/(26.01-18.35)=-0.03 i.e. NEGATIVE at deal_price (already above bid); positive R:R only exists vs the $41.83 book-value standalone thesis.
BZH.expected_close_date: uncertain - no signed deal; DFH pursuing shareholder persuasion / possible proxy or tender, 2H-2026 at earliest if re-engaged

Normalized mid-cycle Adj EBITDA ~$175M (vs FY2025 GAAP EBITDA -$114M trough, Q1-2026 Adj EBITDA just $3.3M; FY2024 $128M / FY2023 $263M for cycle context). No clean transaction comp -> floor widened to ~tangible book. Net debt $54.6M (Q1 2026; cash $96.4M, gross debt $151M). 188.4M shares. NOTE: live $3.83 already prices much of the recovery -> thin upside, real cyclical downside.

LZM.valuation_basis: Single-asset developer NAV re-rate on a dated FID catalyst. Kabanga Ni-sulfide (LZM 84%, Tanzania govt 16% free-carry) July-2025 FS: after-tax NPV(8%) USD 1.58B @ $8.49/lb Ni, IRR 23.3%, AISC $3.36/lb, initial capex $942M (StockTitan/Mining.com 12/11/2025). Attributable NPV = 84% x $1,580M = $1,327M (after-tax, post-capex equity DCF). Apply 0.50x P/NAV post-FID/financing-close re-rate (single-asset, Tanzania country risk, financing/dilution overhang) booked as a signed risk discount of $664M. Net debt ~$30M (post $75M H2-25 raise + $60M bridge, less burn). FV = (1,327 - 30 - 664)/89.9 = $7.04. Aligns BTIG $7 Buy. Floor = stalled/un-financed developer at ~0.18x attributable NAV with dilution = ~$2.60 (below 52-wk low $3.07, embeds financing-failure de-rate).
LZM.valuation_method_note: supply_timing lane mapped to SoP/NAV: a single pre-FID development asset re-rating on a dated, forward, not-yet-fired catalyst (mid/late-2026 FID + financing close).

NVCR.valuation_basis: BARBELL on FDA PMA decision Q4-2026 for Optune Lua/Mya in NSCLC brain metastases (METIS). METIS HIT primary endpoint: median time-to-intracranial-progression 21.9mo vs 11.3mo, HR 0.67, p=0.016 (n=298). BUT all key secondaries (OS, neurocognitive failure, radiologic response) MISSED significance and were planned labeling claims. Device PMA bar (primary met + safety, plus TTFields already FDA-approved in GBM/mesothelioma/met-NSCLC = strong precedent) -> win_prob 0.80. target_on_win $22.00: approval confirmed but brain-mets is a NARROW commercial opp (short Tx duration, poor prognosis; Lua+Pax guide only $15-25M 2026 rev) so re-rate is modest off $17.20 (mostly de-risks the multi-indication platform story; Street median PT $33.5 is a 12mo blended multi-indication case, not the event). downside_on_loss $13.50 on a CRL = revert toward 50d avg $14.26 / pre-run base, NOT cash: core GBM Optune business stands (~$600M+ rev run-rate, $441.8M cash+STI, net cash ~$207M). Source: Novocure METIS PR + ASTRO 2025; Q1-2026 8-K (cash). reference_rr = EV%.
NVCR.prob_basis: win_prob 0.80: METIS primary endpoint met with p=0.016 + acceptable safety, and TTFields is already FDA-approved across 3 prior indications (regulatory precedent lowers device-PMA risk). Discount vs near-certainty reflects the OS/secondary-endpoint misses that were intended labeling claims. EV = 0.80*(22.00-17.20)+0.20*(13.50-17.20)= +$3.10 => +18.0%.

NXST.valuation_basis: Acquirer-side binary on the contested $22.00/sh cash, $6.2B Tegna acquisition (announced 19-Aug-2025). Deal 'closed' 19-Mar-2026 but ENJOINED 21-Apr-2026 (district court granted preliminary injunction finding likely Sec.7 antitrust harm); now in expedited 9th Circuit appeal. deal_price $255 = the level NXST re-rates to if injunction is vacated and deal stands: 40%+ FCF accretion + $300M synergies, ~7.0x pro-forma blended 2026-27 adj EBITDA ~$2.8B (Deutsche); FMP consensus PT $250, bullish set $270-300 (Guggenheim/Benchmark) -> use $255 (conservative-of-bull). undisturbed_price $165 = pre-bid standalone NXST (Q2'25 buybacks ~$159.71; standalone 2026 adj EBITDA $1.95-2.05B). Next hard date = 9th Circuit briefing completes late-Jun-2026, ruling 'well into fall 2026'. Source: CNBC/Deadline/Variety Apr-2026; Nexstar 19-Aug-2025 deal PR; Seeking Alpha accretion.
NXST.prob_basis: break_prob 0.55 (more-likely-than-not to fail): a granted antitrust preliminary injunction is hard to overturn on appeal, the competitive harm finding is substantive, and even a win means trial not certain close; partly offset by FCC ownership-cap tailwinds. Market ($177 vs $255 win/$165 floor) implies only ~13% prob of full win — I assign higher legal odds but still net break-skewed.

RAMP.valuation_basis: Definitive all-cash merger: Publicis acquiring LiveRamp at $38.50/sh (equity ~$2.55B, EV ~$2.167B), both boards approved 15-17 May 2026 (DEFA14A/8-K). deal_price = $38.50. undisturbed_price $29.66 = back out the stated 29.8% premium to 15-May-2026 close (38.50/1.298). Conditions: 2/3 shareholder vote + HSR/foreign antitrust/FDI/CFIUS. Target close end-2026; outside date 16-May-2027 (+3mo ext). Low antitrust overlap (Publicis=agency, RAMP=data-connectivity, mostly vertical); CFIUS (French buyer of US data co) is the only real wrinkle, manageable. Source: SEC DEFA14A (Publicis & LiveRamp) + LiveRamp 8-K, May 2026.
RAMP.prob_basis: break_prob 0.10: strategic all-cash, definitive, board-approved, limited horizontal antitrust overlap; committed deal with a distant outside date. Gross spread $1.06 (2.83% to deal) implies the market prices high close-confidence. Residual risk = CFIUS/FDI on cross-border data-asset transfer.

Less economic net debt ~$1.5B (incl deferred Biotronik consideration; FMP shows $171M borrowings but $2.73B other non-current liab + <3x net-lev target). Less $230M divestiture tax leakage. FV = (7,895 - 1,500 - 230)/44.3 = $139.2 (~52-wk high $139.67 => largely priced; $1B buyback at $132 is unbooked accretive upside). Floor = no-deal conglomerate de-rate ~$108 (above $100 low).

AAUC.valuation_basis: Merger-arb (cash). Zijin Gold International to acquire all AAUC shares for C$44.00/sh cash; at USDCAD 1.39528 (FMP, 2026-06-08) = US$31.54/sh. Deal announced Jan 2026 (struck at C$44 = ~27% premium to 30-day undisturbed VWAP ~C$34.6; only +5.66% to the leak-inflated last close ~C$41.6, per InsideArbitrage 2026-01). Plan of Arrangement approved by holders 99.54%. Canada ICA APPROVED (process complete in Canada), plus ECOWAS & COMESA African competition clearances obtained (MiningWeekly/Manila Times 2026-05-30). Outside date EXTENDED to Jul 29 2026 (further extension needs mutual consent). Gross spread at ref $25.815 to US$31.54 deal = ~22%, pricing real China-block/extension risk. deal_price=31.54 (USD-converted C$44); undisturbed_price=23.0 (USD equiv of ~C$32 pre-leak 30-day VWAP, gold-supported; 200-DMA US$24.2); break_prob 0.28.

ACAD.valuation_basis: BARBELL (not a ratio). Catalyst = Phase 2 RADIANT topline for ACP-204 (remlifanserin), a selective 5-HT2A inverse agonist, in Alzheimer's Disease Psychosis (ADP); ~318 pts, 30/60mg vs placebo, primary = SAPS-H+D at Wk6; topline Aug-Oct 2026, reaffirmed Q1 release (8-K 2026-05-06) and at RBC (5/19) & BofA (5/12). Remlifanserin = ~$4B of ACADIA's ~$11B unadj peak-sales pipeline. PROB BASIS: mixed precedent for 5-HT2A in ADP -- HARMONY (relapse-prevention) hit but FDA rejected the DRP sNDA (2021), and prior ADP acute-treatment efficacy in AD-specific cohorts underwhelmed; CNS/AD Ph2 acute-efficacy base rate is low. New, cleaner Ph2 design + selective molecule, but still a hard binary readout -> win_prob 0.35 (calibrated). target_on_win 31.0 (positive Ph2 de-risks the ~$4B asset -> re-rate toward 52-wk high $28.35 + pipeline credit). downside_on_loss 16.5 -- NOT a cash shell: 171.3M sh, Nuplazid+Daybue commercial base + ~$700M cash floor the equity below the 52-wk low $19.69 but a clean miss on a flagship asset re-rates to base-business value ~$16-17. reference_rr is EV%: EV=0.35*31+0.65*16.5=$21.58 vs ref 21.33 (~+1.2% upside) for ~-23% downside -> rr ~0.05; market is fairly/efficiently pricing this binary.
ACAD.prob_basis: Mixed 5-HT2A-in-ADP precedent: HARMONY relapse-prevention hit but DRP sNDA FDA-rejected 2021; acute ADP efficacy in AD-specific cohorts historically weak; CNS Ph2 acute-efficacy base rate ~25-35%. New selective molecule + cleaner 6-wk design nudges up -> 0.35.

Floor = no-deal de-rate: activist exits, discount re-widens to ~18% on a gold-miner CEF + risk-off beta = ~$50.00 (below current, strips activist premium).

So value standalone parts; carry QLE conservatively, widen floor. (1) Helium&LNG (Renergen, closed 1/7/26) at disclosed gas-property asset value $130.2M. (2) Specialist Isotopes (Si-28/C-14/Mo-100) ~$25M ramping rev x 8x sales (early-commercial specialty; no clean pure-play comp -> judgmental, floor widened) = $200M. Sum EV $480M; net cash ~$28M (debt $262M vs cash+STI $290.5M); minority $10M. FV = (480 +28 -10)/83.1 = $5.99 -> trades BELOW live $6.83 (QLE hope already priced; honest NO_UPSIDE). HCW fundamental tgt $5.50 vs speculative consensus $12+. Floor = spin-failure + securities-litigation de-rate to Renergen hard asset + net cash + residual isotopes = ~$3.00 (below 52-wk low $3.92).

AVIR.valuation_basis: BARBELL (not a ratio). Catalyst = Phase 3 C-BEYOND HCV topline, fully enrolled (>880 pts, ~120 US/Canada sites), due MID-2026, reaffirmed on the 2026-05-12 Q1 call (companion C-FORWARD by YE26). Regimen = bemnifosbuvir + ruzasvir; Ph2 reference bar ~98% SVR12 in adherent pts. PROB BASIS: DAA HCV mechanism is well-validated and Ph3 success rates are HIGH when Ph2 SVR is strong (DAAs are mechanistically de-risked vs novel CNS/onc); main risks are pan-genotypic consistency, cirrhotic subgroup, and 8-wk duration -> win_prob 0.57 (calibrated, above coin-flip given the SVR bar). target_on_win 9.5 (positive Ph3 -> approvable HCV combo asset; crowded/declining market caps the re-rate below a clean blockbuster). downside_on_loss 3.20 = NET CASH floor: $256.0M cash+investments at 3/31/26 (Q1 10-Q), net cash ~$78.7M intra-co but total cash/sh = $256M / ~80M sh (commonStock $80k @ $0.001 par) ~ $3.20; runway through 2027. Market at ref $4.335 already prices ~cash + small option. reference_rr is EV%: EV=0.57*9.5+0.43*3.2=$6.79 vs ref 4.335 (+56.6% upside) for -26.2% downside to cash -> rr ~2.16; favorably skewed barbell.
AVIR.prob_basis: DAA HCV is a mechanistically de-risked class; Ph3 success likelihood high when Ph2 SVR12 is strong (~98% adherent). Residual risk = pan-genotypic/cirrhotic subgroups & 8-wk duration -> 0.57.

BBCQ.valuation_basis: Merger-arb / NAV-backed de-SPAC. Pasqal x BBCQ definitive business combination (announced 2026-03-04, BusinessWire; $2.0B Pasqal pre-money; F-4 filed; $312.5M upsized convertible financing). Trust = $289,715,723 across 28,750,000 public Class A shares = $10.08 redemption NAV at 2026-03-31 (10-Q, accreting ~$0.025/mo to an H2-2026 close -> ~$10.25 at close). Stock $10.50 trades ABOVE current trust, i.e. the market already prices deal-completion optionality on top of the cash floor — there is NO positive arb to NAV from here; the value of the position is the NAV-backed downside protection, not a spread. deal_price set to NAV-at-close ($10.25, the redeemable value you collect if you hold to vote/redeem); undisturbed = $10.00 IPO. Negative reference_rr is honest: at $10.50 you are paying ~$0.42 over the $10.08 floor for deal+warrant optionality.
BBCQ.prob_basis: Definitive agreement + F-4 filed (May 26) + upsized $312.5M convertibles committed -> moderate-to-high completion; principal break risk is redemptions/min-cash ($150M required) and a speculative quantum target. break_prob ~0.25 (low) given financing in place.

Boral ARC, $500M all-stock consideration (50,000,000 PubCo shares @ $10.00), signed 2026-01-11; S-4 FILED but NOT yet declared effective as of early June 2026 (WATCH, not ACTIVE). BCAR.prob_basis: S-4 filed but not effective + only a $5M minimum-cash condition (weak signal) + early-stage, capital-hungry AI-compute target -> higher break/redemption risk than BBCQ. break_prob ~0.40.

BIO.valuation_basis: Classic activist holdco-discount SoP. Elliott (also holds Sartorius) disclosed BIO stake 5/17-18/26 to force monetization of the trapped 28% Sartorius stake. (1) Sartorius 28% stake gross MV ~$5.0B (Elliott/press May-26; cross-check BIO Q1-26 long-term investments $5.31B, down from $6.1B Q4-25).
